title: ImpossibleCraft
description: A modpack that tries to make minecraft as hard as possible. Almost impossible! Try to survive!
body:
this modpack aims to make minecraft as hard as possible, by adding lifesteal, a harder wither and enderdragon, much harder mobs, a very rare blood moon,  and alot more!



<details>
<summary>Mods included</summary>

<details>
<summary>coolest mod features</summary>

harder mobs (brutal nightmare: insane difficulty, mobs improve over time)

shaders (iris shaders, euphoria patches, complementary reimagined)

lifesteal

a chance for giant zombies to spawn (giant spawn)

seasons (SereneSeasons)

tornados (tornado mod classic)



play with friends (e4mc)

get different loot for each player! (lootr)

more advancements!

realistic health!

tempature!

and alot more (read mods included)
</details>


insane things can happen! 
like insane storms!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4cBvPF1b_oU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

and alot more!



**IF YOU ARE ON A LOW END DEVICE, THE FIRST THING YOU SHOULD DO IS DISABLE, OR CHANGE THE GRAPHICS SETTINGS ON THE SHADERS, BECAUSE THEY ARE PRETTY HEAVY.**
